body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/286391906?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/alanturing881", "id": 286391906, "login": "alanturing881", "node_id": "U_kgDOERH-Yg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/alanturing881", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:P/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-116", "name": "Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output"}], "description": "## Summary The Twig template `resources/views/list/ale.twig` renders the piggy bank name from `AuditLogEntry.after.piggy` using the `|raw` filter, bypassing Twig's auto-escaping. A piggy bank created with an HTML payload in its name executes arbitrary JavaScript in any browser viewing that transaction's audit log. ## Root Cause The `|raw` filter is required on the outer `trans()` call to preserve `` tags in the `amount` parameter (currency styling). However, this also disables escaping for the user-controlled `name` parameter. **Vulnerable code (`resources/views/list/ale.twig` lines 107, 110):** ```twig {{ trans('firefly.ale_action_log_add', { amount: formatAmountBySymbol(...), name: logEntry.after.piggy })|raw }} ``` No HTML sanitization at storage time — `PiggyBankStoreRequest` only validates `min:1|max:255|uniquePiggyBankForUser`. ## Data Flow ``` POST /api/v1/piggy-banks {"name": ""} → Stored verbatim in piggy_banks.name → Transaction rule fires add_to_piggy / remove_from_piggy → UpdatePiggyBank::handle() stores AuditLogEntry.after.piggy = raw name → Any user views /transactions/show/{id} → ale.twig outputs unescaped payload → XSS fires ``` ## CSP Note The nonce-based CSP (`script-src 'nonce-...' 'strict-dynamic'`) does **not** prevent this attack. Inline event handlers (`onerror`, `onload`) in HTML attributes are governed by `script-src-attr`, which is unrestricted in the current policy. The `` payload bypasses the nonce requirement entirely. ## PoC 1. Authenticate as any user 2. `POST /api/v1/piggy-banks` with `"name": ""` 3. Create a rule: action = "Add money to piggy bank [attacker's piggy bank]" 4. Trigger the rule on any transaction 5. Visit `/transactions/show/{id}` → payload fires **Confirmed server response (v6.6.2):** ```html Added EUR 50.00 to piggy bank "" ``` ## Impact - Stored XSS persists in DB — fires for every user who views the transaction - Cookie theft → session hijacking - In multi-user setups: one user attacks another user or admin - Chainable with CSRF-like operations ## Fix PR #12271 (merged into `develop`): add `|e` to escape only the user-controlled `name` parameter. ```twig {{ trans('firefly.ale_action_log_add', { amount: formatAmountBySymbol(...), name: logEntry.after.piggy|e })|raw }} ```", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6jq6-x4cx-qvcm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-12T15:04:50Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6jq6-x4cx-qvcm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6jq6-x4cx-qvcm"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-12T15:04:50Z", "references": ["https://github.com/firefly-iii/firefly-iii/security/advisories/GHSA-6jq6-x4cx-qvcm", "https://github.com/firefly-iii/firefly-iii/pull/12271", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6jq6-x4cx-qvcm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/firefly-iii/firefly-iii/security-advisories/GHSA-6jq6-x4cx-qvcm", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/firefly-iii/firefly-iii", "summary": "Firefly II has Stored XSS in Audit Log Entry view via piggy bank name (ale.twig)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-12T15:04:51Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6jq6-x4cx-qvcm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.6.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "grumpydictator/firefly-iii"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 6.6.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Firefly II has Stored XSS in Audit Log Entry view via piggy bank name (ale.twig)
